description: Schema-validated split manifest for a governed rescue ranking dataset.

required_fields.name: contract_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the rescue task contract artifact.

required_fields.name: governance_status
required_fields.description: Whether the split manifest is an example, planned, or active artifact.

required_fields.name: freeze_manifest_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the governing rescue freeze manifest.

required_fields.name: source_dataset_id
required_fields.description: Frozen ranking dataset that the split plan applies to.

required_fields.name: split_seed
required_fields.description: Random seed for deterministic split assignment.

required_fields.name: assignment_unit
required_fields.description: Entity unit assigned into train, validation, and test partitions.

required_fields.name: partitions
required_fields.description: Declared split partitions and their leakage constraints.

required_fields.name: description
required_fields.description: Short governance summary for the split manifest.
